evalAfter: (async () => { const r={}; const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||'')); if(btn)btn.click(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,3000)); r.version=(await fetch('version.json?b='+Date.now()).then(x=>x.json()).catch(()=>({}))).version; try{MOS.nav('catalogo');}catch(e){} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,4500)); MOS.abrirModalPrecioRapido('IDPRO0000063'); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,1000)); const sheet=document.querySelector('.qp-sheet-v2,.qp-sheet'); r.cascadaBg=sheet?getComputedStyle(sheet).backgroundImage.slice(0,40):null; const base=document.querySelector('.qp-base-card'); r.baseBorde=base?getComputedStyle(base).borderColor:null; MOS.cerrarModalPrecioRapido(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,400)); MOS.abrirModalPrecioCurvas('IDPRO0001147'); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,2800)); r.curvasVisible=getComputedStyle(document.getElementById('pcCurvasModal')||{}).display; r.puntos=document.querySelectorAll('#pcCurvasChart circle').length; return r; })()
